draft_picks.match: Houston Rockets vs Los Angeles Lakers
draft_picks.reasoning: LAL (43-25, L10: 9-1, W6) visiting HOU (41-26, L10: 5-5). LAL's L10 dominance (9-1 vs 5-5) is a strong priority-1 signal. No franchise player injuries on either side — Kleber (LAL) is a role player, Adams/Tate (HOU) are non-franchise. LAL overall .632 W% means hot-streak fade rule does NOT apply (requires sub-.550). HOU home court is a slight positive for HOU but insufficient to overcome LAL's superior recent form. Late-season flag: LAL at 43-25 may manage stars, but no current evidence of rest plans. HOU fighting for seeding (motivation positive) but L10 5-5 limits confidence boost. Advanced stats unavailable — ML only session. EV = (0.63 × 1.76) - 1 = +0.109 (10.9% — marginal but meets ≥0.05 threshold). Confidence tier: Medium (55-69) → 15% stake.
